mapper.select: SELECT mo.*, m.name AS material_name, m.unit, u1.real_name AS applicant_name, u2.real_name AS approver_name FROM material_outbound mo LEFT JOIN material m ON mo.material_id = m.id LEFT JOIN user u1 ON mo.applicant_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON mo.approver_id = u2.id WHERE mo.status = #{status} ORDER BY mo.create_time DESC
SELECT mo.*, m.name AS material_name, m.unit FROM material_outbound mo LEFT JOIN material m ON mo.material_id = m.id WHERE mo.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_outbound (outbound_no, workshop, applicant_id, material_id, quantity, status, remark) VALUES (#{outboundNo}, #{workshop}, #{applicantId}, #{materialId}, #{quantity}, #{status}, #{remark})
